pattern: Count the number of intervals [startTime[i], endTime[i]] that contain queryTime using a simple scan.
hints: Iterate over both arrays simultaneously — for student i, the homework overlaps the query if startTime[i] <= queryTime <= endTime[i].
Increment a counter whenever both conditions hold and return it.
No sorting needed; a single pass through the arrays is sufficient.

edge_inputs.description: single student active exactly at query
all students done exactly at query minus 1

stress.description: random students with random start/end and query
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = size
    start = [rng.randint(1, 500) for _ in range(n)]
    end = [rng.randint(s, 1000) for s in start]
    q = rng.randint(1, 1000)
    return [start, end, q]
